description: The Somali Outlaws are a Somali American street gang based in the Minneapolis–Saint Paul metropolitan area, active since the 2000s. The gang operates primarily around the Karmel Mall in south Minneapolis and the Cedar-Riverside neighborhood, with additional territory in Saint Paul and Nashville. Their activities include drug trafficking and human trafficking. The gang's leader, Mustafa Ali, was killed in 2019.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Cedar-Riverside, Minneapolis , Saint Paul , and Nashville
country_links.context: The Somali Outlaws have territory in Minneapolis, Saint Paul, and Nashville, indicating a physical presence in the United States.
